acceptance_criteria.text: Template_3 Excel scene_description uses Russian/original transcript text when the selected transcript artifact has an original_text column and the run's corrected text is not Russian.

proof.command: Synthetic workbook generation with target_language=en, English text, and Russian original_text.
proof.summary: Generated Excel raw scene_description cells used Russian original_text.

acceptance_criteria.text: When the selected transcript artifact is already targeted to Russian (target_language=ru) and has populated text, Template_3 may use the corrected Russian text column.

proof.summary: target_language=ru selected the corrected text column.

acceptance_criteria.text: The change is scoped to Template_3 Excel display; TRIBE word events, scoring inputs, HTML transcript display, cache metadata, and transcript files are not changed.

proof.summary: Implementation scope is limited to template3_report.py scene_description text-column selection.

proof.command: Transcript file check after workbook generation.
proof.summary: The input transcript still contained English selected text after report generation.

acceptance_criteria.text: If no Russian/original display column is available, Template_3 falls back to the existing selected transcript text column.

proof.command: Synthetic fallback workbook generation with only selected text.
proof.summary: Generated Excel scene_description used selected text when original_text was missing.

acceptance_criteria.text: Generated Excel workbooks preserve Russian UTF-8 text in 1_RAW_CORRELATIONS!C* and 2_FRAME_MARKUP continues to reference those raw cells.

proof.summary: 1_RAW_CORRELATIONS!C4:C5 contained Russian snippets, and 2_FRAME_MARKUP!C4 referenced the raw cell.

acceptance_criteria.text: Focused checks prove syntax, text-column selection, workbook generation, and diff hygiene.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: Run text-column selection unit check for _scene_description_text_column.
Generate a Template_3 workbook with target_language=en, English text, Russian original_text, and inspect 1_RAW_CORRELATIONS!C*.
Generate a Template_3 workbook with only text and inspect fallback scene_description.
known_gaps: Excel formula recalculation itself was not evaluated in desktop Excel/LibreOffice; generated workbook cell contents and formulas were inspected structurally.
If the transcript artifact has no Russian/source/original text column, the report can only fall back to the selected transcript text.
